item_text: local user: "l'utente deve avere un consumo" — no explicit branches.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-consumption-tracking-001 title: successful consumption tracking module: consumption tracking source pages: 1, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 preconditions: user is authenticated and has valid consumption data. test data: valid consumption data for a user. test steps: 1. user enters valid consumption data in the local user interface. 2. local user sends the data to the main component. 3. main component sends the data to the data manager. 4. data manager processes the data and confirms success. 5. main component confirms the addition to the local user. 6. local user requests a report from the main component. 7. main component requests data from the data manager. 8. data manager provides the report data and confirms success. 9. main component sends the report to the local user. 10. local user deletes the report. 11. local user confirms deletion to the main component. 12. main component confirms the deletion to the local user. expected result: consumption data should be successfully tracked, and the user should be able to generate and delete reports.
